commands.review_summary:
The PR adds a QA Lab native vitest scenario linking three existing Gateway WebSocket coverage IDs, moves the MCP connect-timeout helper into the MCP temp-state harness helper, updates changed-test routing, and deletes unused duplicate MCP WebSocket-open helper coverage.

PR surface: Tests -71, Other -57. Total -128 across 9 files.

Reproducibility: not applicable. this is QA coverage cleanup rather than a bug report. I traced the catalog/native runner and helper usages on current main instead of reproducing a failing user path.

target.title: chore: link MCP gateway transport QA coverage
target.body:
## What Problem This Solves

The QA scenario inventory did not link existing Gateway/MCP transport evidence for the WebSocket connect request, protocol range, and startup retry behavior used by MCP channel bridge clients.

## Why This Change Was Made

Adds a native QA scenario wrapper for `src/gateway/client.test.ts` with primary coverage for existing IDs only: `gateway.connect-request`, `gateway.protocol-version-negotiation`, and `gateway.startup-retry`. It also folds the MCP stdio connect timeout helper into the existing MCP client harness helper and deletes the unused MCP-specific WebSocket-open duplicate, relying on the existing shared WebSocket helper/test instead.

Non-goal: no taxonomy changes, and no primary claim for `anthropic.mcp-tool-bridge` because these tests do not exercise the Anthropic Claude CLI bridge path.

## User Impact

Operators get more accurate QA evidence for existing Gateway WebSocket coverage IDs without adding another script-only helper path. The MCP Docker harness keeps the same timeout behavior, but with fewer standalone E2E helper files to maintain.

## Evidence

- `node scripts/run-vitest.mjs test/scripts/mcp-connect-timeout.test.ts test/scripts/mcp-channels-harness.test.ts test/scripts/test-projects.test.ts extensions/qa-lab/src/scenario-catalog.test.ts --reporter=verbose`
- `node scripts/run-vitest.mjs src/gateway/client.test.ts --reporter=verbose`
- `pnpm openclaw qa suite --provider-mode mock-openai --scenario mcp-gateway-connect-startup-retry --output-dir .artifacts/qa-e2e/mcp-gateway-connect-startup-retry`
- `.agents/skills/autoreview/scripts/autoreview --mode local`
